steps.text: Sit comfortably. Put one hand on your belly.
steps.hint: Feel your belly move when you breathe.

steps.text: Breathe in slowly and imagine the color RED filling your body.
steps.hint: Breathe out gently like a soft wind.

steps.text: Now breathe in ORANGE, then YELLOW, then GREEN.
steps.hint: Each breath is a new color.

steps.text: Breathe in BLUE and PURPLE. Let your whole body feel like a rainbow.
steps.hint: Notice how calm your body feels now.
